name: 007n7 - Forsaken
description:
Pspsps, hey @Ieatghostsforbreakfast. Come get your food sweetie <3

I'm gonna be honest guys, I haven't played Forsaken yet and am really only making this bot cause a certain someone really really loves this guy. So I'm really sorry if I end up getting any of his lore wrong I'm going off of what my friend said and a screenshot of some of his lore

This is definitely gonna be one of my more tamer bots, but don't expect that to be a regular thing (I say that as if I upload on a regular basis)
creator: SpecterNCustard
